name: staked-media-extension
description: Build tooling for Staked Media Copilot browser extension

scripts.copy:static: cp public/manifest.json public/panel.html public/options.html dist/ && cp -R public/icons dist/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:scripts && npm run build:styles && npm run copy:static
scripts.test:compiled: npm run build && npm run build:tests && node --test tests-dist/*.test.js
